nodes.name: Google Docs - create blog draft
nodes.notes: Attach a Google Docs OAuth credential in n8n. Without a real document URL, the callback builder keeps the item out of ready_for_manual_upload.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, request_id: $json.body?.request_id ?? $json.request_id ?? null, message: 'Workflow accepted. Result will be sent by callback.' }) }}
